summary: The diff implements comprehensive fixes across all six requirements (REQ-9 through REQ-14). Backend fixes in main.mo address postMessage, getMessages, createUserProfile, getUserProfile, friend request functions, private threads, and updateOnlineStatus. Frontend fixes cover MessageFeed auto-scroll, MessageInput, FriendsPanel, FriendListItem, FriendRequestItem, PrivateChatView, ProfileSetupModal, DisplayNamePrompt, VideoCallModal, and useVideoCall hook. A migration module is also added. The implementation appears thorough and matches the requested acceptance criteria well.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to support data migration on upgrades using a 'with migration' clause in the actor.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement in the BuildRequest asked for a data migration module or upgrade migration support. The constraints only said not to change the existing data model or break backwards compatibility, not to implement an explicit migration module.

hallucinated_features.description: Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags were added to index.html along with an updated app title and meta description for App Market publishing.
hallucinated_features.reason: None of REQ-9 through REQ-14 request social sharing metadata or App Market preparation updates. The non-goals explicitly exclude adding new features beyond what is already implemented.
